qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: He writes a letter.
o: A letter is written by him.
A letter was written by him.
A letter has been written by him.
A letter is being written by him.

qs.q: বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: She sang a song.
o: A song was sung by her.
A song is sung by her.
A song had been sung by her.
A song has been sung by her.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: They are playing cricket.
o: Cricket is being played by them.
Cricket was being played by them.
Cricket has been played by them.
Cricket is played by them.

qs.q: বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: He was reading a book.
o: A book was being read by him.
A book is being read by him.
A book had been read by him.
A book has been read by him.

qs.q: সঠিক ভয়েস পরিবর্তনটি নির্বাচন করুন: I have finished the work.
o: The work has been finished by me.
The work was finished by me.
The work is finished by me.
The work had been finished by me.

qs.q: বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: She had written a novel.
o: A novel had been written by her.
A novel has been written by her.
A novel was written by her.
A novel is written by her.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: Open the door.
o: Let the door be opened.
The door should be opened.
You are ordered to open the door.
The door is opened.

qs.q: সঠিক ভয়েস পরিবর্তনটি নির্বাচন করুন: You should respect your elders.
o: Your elders should be respected by you.
Your elders must be respected by you.
Your elders are respected by you.
Your elders had been respected by you.

qs.q: বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: My father gave me a gift.
o: I was given a gift by my father.
A gift was given to me by my father.
Both A and B are correct.
A gift is given to me by my father.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: Did he break the glass?
o: Was the glass broken by him?
Is the glass broken by him?
Has the glass been broken by him?
Did the glass break by him?
